DECLARATION OF LORI RIVERA IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION FOR DELAY IN PROSECUTION (TRANSACTION ID # 62700305) FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SU, JULIE IN HER OFFICIAL CAPACITY AS CHIEF DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST JULIE SU'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION FOR DELAY IN PROSECUTION IS GRANTED. THIS CASE IS NOW DISMISSED BECAUSE IT WAS NOT BROUGHT TO TRIAL OR A HEARING WITHIN FIVE YEARS OF THE DATE IT WAS FILED. PETITIONERS HAVE NOT SHOWN WHY THE FIVE YEAR STATUTE SHOULD NOT APPLY TO THIS CASE NOR HAVE THEY PROVIDED ANY EVIDENCE SUPPORTING ANY STATUTORY EXCEPTION TO THE FIVE YEAR STATUTE. THE DECLARATION OF ROBERT FRIED, THE SOLE ITEM OF EVIDENCE SUBMITTED BY PETITIONERS, DOES NOT ATTACH ANY DOCUMENTS. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action For Delay In Prosecution; Memorandum In Support; Declaratin Of Evan Adams
Off Calendar Dec-19-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Fried, Esq., Atkinson, Andelson, Loya, Ruud & Romo, Telephone 925-251-8515, appearing for Plaintiff;
Evan Adams, Esq., Department Of Industrial Relations, Telephone 415-703-4824, appearing for Real Party In Interest, Julie su;

RULING: ARGUED: The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Real Party in Interest Julie Su's motion to dismiss action for delay in prosecution is granted. This case is now dismissed because it was not brought to trial or a hearing within five years of the date it was filed. Petitioners have not shown why the five year statute should not apply to this case nor have they provided any evidence supporting any statutory exception to the five year statute. The declaration of Robert Fried, the sole item of evidence submitted by petitioners, does not attach any documents. Order is signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/HEK)
